## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX) and Janis Krums to explore potential collaboration and investment opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX: AI-powered content creation platform, combining AI workflows with expert human intervention](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Current focus: Scaling high-quality content production for B2B tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Business model: $20-30k strategy sprint, then $9-60k/month for ongoing execution](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Impressive client roster: Reddit, Webflow, SentinelOne, Okta, Ramp, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Gearing up for Series B funding round in the coming months](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

## Topics

### Personal Backgrounds

  - [Marcel: Ex-CMO (HashiCorp, Scale AI, DeepGram), content marketing expert](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Janis: Angel investor (13+ years), founder (recruiting, fintech, hospitality)](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### GrowthX Overview

  - [Problem: Enterprise inefficiency in content marketing spend](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Solution: AI-powered content engine + expert network](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Key differentiators:](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
      - [Strategy sprint for alignment](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
      - [AI coding agent for workflow automation](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
      - [Human-in-the-loop for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Services: Content strategy, creation, distribution (articles, newsletters, landing pages)](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Internal use: Applying platform to streamline hiring (1000+ daily applicants)](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

### Business Model & Traction

  - [Pricing: $20-30k strategy sprint, then $9-60k/month ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
  - [Client examples:](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
      - [Ramp: Built vendor directory site](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
      - [Augment: Created CodeLibrary.ai](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)
      - [Various: Newsletters, SEO content, product pages](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Started as workshop, quickly evolved into full-service offering](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)

### Technology Stack

  - [AI coding agent: Builds process workflows into executable code](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Runtime engine: Executes workflows (research, analysis, content creation)](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Human intervention layer: Expert editing and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Learning engine: Improves from human feedback](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Janis to potentially introduce a fintech client to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Marcel to share additional info (pitch deck, etc.) for Janis to review](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)
  - [Reconnect in \~1 month to discuss potential collaboration/investment](https://fathom.video/share/S5S97d6io8ogG7sTkymMPwaoq_6bvHpK?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
